title: selaginella stenophylla
intro: Selaginella stenophylla, also known as the needle fern, is a type of plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenes. The health benefits of Selaginella stenophylla include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as tea or infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits, and it may also be used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
